zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Morgan於大約1474年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞時，她的父親Sir John Morgan47歲，母親Jonet Mathew30歲。她於1490年與Sir John Clinton在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德加結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1501年在英國英格蘭素可賀斯特蒙瑟享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Morgan于大约1474年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞时，她的父亲Sir John Morgan47岁，母亲Jonet Mathew30岁。她于1490年与Sir John Clinton在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德加结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1501年在英国英格兰素可賀斯特蒙瑟享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Morgan was born about 1474, in Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Sir John Morgan, was 47 and her mother, Jonet Mathew, was 30. She married Sir John Clinton in 1490, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1501, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Morgan est née environ 1474, à Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir John Morgan, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Jonet Mathew, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clinton en 1490, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1501, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

ko.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Morgan(이)가 대략 1474년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Morgan(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jonet Mathew(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1490년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 Sir John Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Morgan родилась около 1474 г. в местности тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir John Morgan было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet Mathew, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Clinton в 1490 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1501 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.
